title: API Resources, Object Identity, Schemas, Desired State, and Status · Reconciliation Triage
summary: An incident responder inherits a plausible but defective versioned API object contract; preserve status and events, isolate the first causal fault in api resources, object identity, schemas, desired state, and status, and retain a regression check. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in versioned API object contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evi…
objectives: Resolve API group, version, kind, plural resource, scope, endpoint, and served or stored version for a concrete object.
Separate desired spec, controller-owned status, metadata generation, observedGeneration, and status conditions before judging convergence.
Use namespace, name, UID, resourceVersion, generation, timestamps, and managed fields to distinguish identity, concurrency, and history.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug K8s Api Stability Deprecation
steps.instruction:
Append the Kubernetes evidence item headed "  # Evidence: k8s-api-stability-deprecation-m11dng". Tailor its api-object.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic API or manifest review command, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run kubectl, Helm, kubeadm, and cluster commands later in an authorized disposable transfer environment.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug K8s Api Stability Deprecation.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns K8s Api Stability Deprecation into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug K8s Api Stability Deprecation, keep K8s Api Stability Deprecation connected to mechanically reviewable Kubernetes object, status, and transfer evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: k8s-api-stability-deprecation-m11dng
  - competency: k8s-api-stability-deprecation
    artifact: api-object.yaml
    decision: api stability deprecation
    environment: kubeadm recovery cluster restored onto replacement nodes
    fault-injection: delete one ready Pod during a configuration rollout
    retained-proof: scheduler event eligible domains skew and placement result
    case-key: m11dng
    change: |
      apiVersion: apps/v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
      name: status-api
      spec:
      replicas: 3
      status-evidence: observedGeneration-and-conditions
    verify: kubectl explain deployment.spec --api-version=apps/v1 && kubectl get deployment status-api -o json
    failure: Reject valid-YAML-only evidence, stale status, unknown fields, or an API selected without feature-state and deprecation review.
    repair: Use live discovery and schema, separate spec from status, compare generation with observedGeneration, and preserve object UID and resourceVersion.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.
